svg.title: AI recruitment system — architecture v3
svg.desc: Updated architecture: Phase 2 shows difficulty scaling per experience band. Phase 5 includes rejection tracking with preset and custom reasons, sortable for reconsideration.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about HR login and authentication')
sendPrompt('What does HR configure in the dashboard?')
sendPrompt('What is in the skills and roles dataset?')
sendPrompt('How does credential auto-generation work?')
sendPrompt('How does SendGrid deliver credentials to candidates?')
sendPrompt('How does candidate login and experience band selection work?')
sendPrompt('How does webcam proctoring work?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenAI generate questions scaled by experience band?')
sendPrompt('How does the exam timer and session expiry work?')
sendPrompt('How does auto scoring calculate results?')
sendPrompt('What does PostgreSQL store for candidates and scores?')
sendPrompt('How does the HR ranked view work for manual selection?')
sendPrompt('How does HR upload resumes for selected candidates?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenAI parse resumes to extract skills?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenAI match resume skills against the JD?')
sendPrompt('How is the 90 percent match threshold applied?')
sendPrompt('What is the JD to resume match ID used for?')
sendPrompt('What does the filtered candidate profile view show HR?')
sendPrompt('How does OpenAI generate HR interview questions and answers from resumes?')
sendPrompt('How does the HR final round work using AI generated questions?')
sendPrompt('What happens when HR marks a candidate as hired?')
sendPrompt('What preset rejection reasons are available for HR to choose from?')
sendPrompt('How does HR add a custom rejection reason?')
sendPrompt('How does the rejection sort and reconsideration view work?')

svg.text: React + Shadcn · FastAPI · PostgreSQL + Supabase · OpenAI GPT-4o · face-api.js · SendGrid · Vercel + Render
